name: She Took Everything From Me
overview:
"Won’t your wife get mad if we do this?"

For the sake of family, she sacrifices everything. Until one day, she comes home to find her husband in bed with her best friend. Betrayed by her friend, cheated on by her husband, even her child taken away—she was thrown out of her own home. Is there still hope for her to rise again?
